docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HINDERLEIDER, MICHELE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JOHN CAMPBELL'S IRISH BAKERY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
